title: Pandalam Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Pandalam Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pandalam Mahadeva Temple is situated in between Thottakkonam and Mulampuzha villages of Pandalam in Kerala, India, on the bank of Achankovil river.
overview.description: Pandalam Mahadeva Temple is situated in between Thottakkonam and Mulampuzha villages of Pandalam in Kerala, India, on the bank of Achankovil river. The main deity of the temple is Lord Shiva, who is considered to be in a pleasant mood with his consort Parvati on his lap. Yearly Kettukazhcha festival is one of the attractions for tourists. 10 days major festival is celebrated in 'Dhanu masa' (November–December) every year.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kulanada
topPlaces.description: Kulanada is a village in the district of Pathanamthitta bordering with Alappuzha district in Kerala state within India. Kulanada assumed its name from the combination of words "Kulam" and "Nada".

topPlaces.name: Pandalam Suspension Bridge
topPlaces.description: Pandalam Suspension Bridge is a pedestrian suspension bridge which crosses the Achankovil River in the state of Kerala, India. It connects Ayyappa Temple with Kaippuzha Sreekrishna Temple.

topPlaces.name: Valiyakoikkal Temple
topPlaces.description: Valiakoikkal Temple is the family temple of the Pandalam Royal Family. The temple is located at Pandalam in Pathanamthitta District, Kerala, in the peninsular India.

topPlaces.name: Pattupurakkavu Bhagavathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Thonnallur Pattupurakkavu Bhagavathi temple (Malayalam: തോന്നല്ലൂര് പാട്ടുപുരക്കാവ് ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a famous Hindu temple at Pandalam, India. It is located one kilometre to the north of Pandalam junction, by the Thiruvananthapuram - Angamaly MC Road.

topPlaces.name: Pandalam Bridge
topPlaces.description: Pandalam Bridge, popularly known as Kurunthottayam Bridge, is a concrete bridge constructed at Pandalam junction in Kerala, India. Kerala Public Works Department commissioned the bridge and opened for public at December 2016.

topPlaces.name: Pandalam Municipality
topPlaces.description: The Municipality of Pandalam also known as Pandalam Municipality (PM) is the civic body that governs Pandalam, the world famous pilgrim town known as the live place of Lord Ayyappa & and it's connection with famous Sabarimala Temple. Pandalam is known as the pilgrim capital of Ayyappa devotees.In every year lakhs of Ayyappa devotees come here to visit Pandalam Ayyappa Temple & Pandalam Palace where Ayyappa lived.Famous Sabarimala Ayyappa Thiruvabharana Procession starts from here.

topPlaces.name: Pandalam KSRTC Bus Station
topPlaces.description: Pandalam KSRTC Bus Station is an important transport hub in the Indian city of Pandalam, owned and operated by the Kerala State Road Transport Corporation (KSRTC) under the depot code PDM. Long distance intrastate, inter-state and city buses run regularly from the bus station.

topPlaces.name: Pandalam
topPlaces.description: Pandalam is a municipality in Pathanamthitta district Kerala, India. Pandalam is known for its connection with Ayyappan and Sabarimala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pandalam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pandalam Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pandalam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pandalam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pandalam Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pandalam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pandalam Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pandalam Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kulanada, Pandalam Suspension Bridge, Valiyakoikkal Temple, Pattupurakkavu Bhagavathi Temple, Pandalam Bridge.
